tasks.task_goal: Align and secure two fabric panels along a seam before stitching
tasks.expected_outcome: The fabric layers are immobilized together along the seam line, preventing shifting while sewing
required_tool_attributes: sharp tapered tip to penetrate fabric with minimal force
rigid slender shaft to resist bending under thumb pressure
small head to concentrate applied pressure and stop pull-through
smooth surface to reduce snagging while maintaining frictional hold

tasks.task_goal: Hold a metal plate steady on a drill press table for accurate hole drilling
tasks.expected_outcome: The metal plate remains fixed in position without sliding or rotating during drilling
required_tool_attributes: small contact foot to focus normal force on the workpiece
rigid linkage to prevent deflection under load
over-center locking mechanism to maintain clamping force
textured or rubberized pad to increase friction

tasks.task_goal: Affix a printed notice to a corkboard in an office hallway
tasks.expected_outcome: The paper stays flat and secured to the board without sagging or falling
required_tool_attributes: sharp point to penetrate cork with minimal effort
rigid pin shaft to transmit localized force
broad head to apply thumb pressure safely
small cross-sectional area to achieve high insertion pressure

tasks.task_goal: Secure a tent corner to the ground in windy conditions
tasks.expected_outcome: The tent remains anchored with the corner immobilized against wind forces
required_tool_attributes: pointed tip to pierce soil with localized force
rigid body to resist bending under tension
hooked or notched head to capture guyline
sufficient length to develop soil frictional hold

tasks.task_goal: Fix a frog specimen to a wax dissection tray for lab examination
tasks.expected_outcome: The specimen is immobilized in the desired orientation for precise cuts and observation
required_tool_attributes: fine sharp tip to penetrate tissue and wax cleanly
rigid stainless steel shaft to hold position
small head for controlled pressure and easy handling
corrosion resistance for wet lab environments

tasks.task_goal: Keep a rolled paper backdrop from curling during a tabletop photo shoot
tasks.expected_outcome: The backdrop edge remains pinned flat to the table, preventing movement and curl
required_tool_attributes: narrow rigid jaws to concentrate clamping force at the edge
strong spring to maintain sustained pressure
textured or slightly grooved jaws to increase friction
flat handles for additional applied leverage

tasks.task_goal: Attach a tomato plant stem to a support stake to guide vertical growth
tasks.expected_outcome: The stem is held gently but firmly against the stake without slipping or damage
required_tool_attributes: small curved contact surfaces to localize pressure without cutting
spring or latch mechanism to maintain clamping force
rigid frame to resist opening under plant weight
slightly textured pads to improve frictional hold

tasks.task_goal: Stabilize a bicycle chain link to press out a pin for removal
tasks.expected_outcome: The selected link is immobilized and the chain pin is driven out cleanly
required_tool_attributes: V-shaped anvil to confine and align chain plates
hardened driving pin with a small contact tip
threaded press mechanism for controlled localized force
rigid body to resist flex during pressing

tasks.task_goal: Hold a thin wire and a small PCB pad steady for soldering
tasks.expected_outcome: The wire and PCB are immobilized in alignment, enabling a clean solder joint
required_tool_attributes: small serrated jaws to increase friction at a tiny contact area
spring tension to maintain continuous pressure
adjustable rigid arms to set position and angle
heat-resistant or insulated jaws near the contact point

tasks.task_goal: Clamp a fish’s tail to a fillet board to keep it from sliding while filleting
tasks.expected_outcome: The fish is firmly held by the tail, allowing safe and accurate filleting
required_tool_attributes: small serrated clamping surface for grip on slippery skin
rigid lever or spring to generate sustained force
corrosion-resistant metal suitable for wet conditions
compact jaw to focus pressure without excessive damage

tasks.task_goal: Secure hair sections to form a bun for a dance performance
tasks.expected_outcome: Hair remains pinned in place throughout the performance without slipping
required_tool_attributes: narrow rigid prongs to localize pressure on hair strands
spring tension between prongs to maintain grip
wavy surface to increase friction with hair
rounded tips for safe application of pressure

tasks.task_goal: Temporarily stop coolant flow by pinching a rubber hose during car maintenance
tasks.expected_outcome: The hose is compressed and fluid flow is halted without damaging the hose
required_tool_attributes: narrow rounded jaws to concentrate force and avoid cutting
adjustable locking mechanism to hold pressure
rigid handles and pivot to transmit clamping force
smooth, non-marring jaw surfaces

tasks.task_goal: Hold delicate trim in place while glue sets during cabinetry
tasks.expected_outcome: Trim is immobilized without visible nail heads until adhesive cures
required_tool_attributes: slim nosepiece to apply localized driving force precisely
high-speed driver to insert small-diameter pins
use of headless micro pins to rely on frictional retention
depth control to avoid surface damage

tasks.task_goal: Seat and hold a wood blank on a lathe to start turning
tasks.expected_outcome: The blank is pinned at the center and driven without slipping during initial cuts
required_tool_attributes: hardened center point and spurs to bite into wood
small, sharp contact teeth to concentrate force
rigid steel body to prevent deflection
compatibility with tailstock pressure to maintain embedment

tasks.task_goal: Attach a race bib to a running shirt before an event
tasks.expected_outcome: The bib stays securely attached without shifting during the run
required_tool_attributes: sharp point to pierce fabric with localized force
rigid wire to maintain shape under tension
locking clasp to hold the pin closed under movement
small cross-section to minimize fabric damage

tasks.task_goal: Anchor weed barrier fabric to the soil around garden beds
tasks.expected_outcome: The fabric remains flat and fixed against wind and foot traffic
required_tool_attributes: U-shaped design with two sharp legs for localized penetration
rigid steel to resist bending in compacted soil
sufficient leg length for soil frictional retention
narrow legs to achieve high insertion pressure

tasks.task_goal: Temporarily hold two sheet metal panels in alignment for riveting
tasks.expected_outcome: Panels are pinned together accurately so permanent fasteners can be installed
required_tool_attributes: expandable pin that applies radial pressure in the hole
precise diameter to fit drilled holes snugly
spring mechanism to maintain constant clamping force
rigid nosepiece for localized contact on panel surfaces

tasks.task_goal: Clamp a bleeding vessel during a first-aid procedure to control hemorrhage
tasks.expected_outcome: The vessel is pinned closed, reducing or stopping blood flow until definitive care
required_tool_attributes: narrow serrated jaws to increase friction on tissue
ratcheting lock to maintain constant pressure
rigid stainless steel structure to transmit localized force
fine tip for precise placement

tasks.task_goal: Mount a smartphone securely on a tripod for steady video recording
tasks.expected_outcome: The phone is immobilized in the clamp without slipping or wobbling
required_tool_attributes: small padded jaws to localize pressure and protect the device
spring or screw mechanism to apply and maintain clamping force
rigid frame to prevent flexing
textured pads to increase friction

tasks.task_goal: Hold a small PCB blank on a CNC router spoilboard for milling
tasks.expected_outcome: The PCB remains firmly pinned in place throughout the milling operation
required_tool_attributes: eccentric cam with a small contact point to concentrate force
rigid base anchored to the table for stability
lever action to generate high normal force quickly
textured or rubberized foot to increase friction
